Check system and security logs for last 7day/24hrs events.

Use the following Kusto to check the Log Ingestion

```
Usage
| summarize TotalVolumeGB = sum(Quantity/ 1000.) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| project Day = TimeGenerated, TotalVolumeGB
| order by Day asc
```

Frontdoor Traffic
```
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category =~ "FrontdoorAccessLog"
| summarize count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
```
Error Count

```
let paramPodNamePrefix= 'wso2is';
let errorType = ': ERROR';
ContainerLog
// | where TimeGenerated < endDateTime
// | where TimeGenerated >= startDateTime
| join kind = inner (KubePodInventory
    | project ContainerID, PodName=Name, ControllerKind, ControllerName, Namespace
    // | where PodName contains paramPodNamePrefix
    | distinct *
    )
    on ContainerID
| project TimeGenerated, Namespace, PodName, LogEntry, ControllerKind, ControllerName 
| where LogEntry has_cs errorType
| summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d) 
| order by TimeGenerated asc 
| render timechart 
```

Error count by Tenant

```
let endDateTime = now();
let startDateTime = ago(30m);
let trendBinSize = 5m;
let paramPodNamePrefix= 'wso2is-deployment';
let errorType = 'ERROR';
let errorRegex = '.*iam-cloud-.* : ERROR {.*} .*';
ContainerLog
// | where TimeGenerated < endDateTime
// | where TimeGenerated >= startDateTime
| join kind = inner (KubePodInventory
    | project ContainerID, PodName=Name, ControllerKind, ControllerName, Namespace
    | where PodName contains paramPodNamePrefix
    | distinct *
) on ContainerID
| where LogEntry has_cs errorType
| where LogEntry matches regex errorRegex
| where LogEntry !contains "Error when setting claim"
| where LogEntry !contains "No message body reader has been found for class java.lang.String, ContentType: application/octet-stream"
| where LogEntry !contains "Error occurred while getting database type from DB connection org.wso2.carbon.user.core.UserStoreException: Error occurred while getting database type from DB connection"
| where LogEntry !contains "Error occurred while getting database type from DB connection org.wso2.charon3.core.exceptions.CharonException: Error occurred while getting database type from DB connection"
| where LogEntry !contains "This password has been used in recent history. Please choose a different password"
| where LogEntry !contains "Error occurred while getting the OAuth App tenantDomain by Consumer key: CHOREO_SYSTEM_APP_MANAGER"
| where LogEntry !contains "ERROR {org.wso2.carbon.identity.oauth2.grant.jwt.JWTBearerGrantHandler} - JSON Web Token is issued before the allowed time."
| where LogEntry !contains "ERROR {org.wso2.carbon.identity.input.validation.mgt.listener.InputValidationListener} - Failed to validate username for user."
| where LogEntry !contains "Caused by: java.sql.BatchUpdateException: Violation of UNIQUE KEY constraint 'UQ__UM_USER___BBB8EC7E9AE1457C'. Cannot insert duplicate key in object 'dbo.UM_USER_ROLE'."
| where LogEntry !contains "{org.wso2.carbon.identity.application.authentication.framework.config.model.graph.openjdk.nashorn.JsOpenJdkNashornGraphBuilder} - Event handler : authenticationOptions is not a function"
| where LogEntry !contains "{org.wso2.carbon.identity.application.authentication.framework.config.model.graph.js.JsClaims} - Error when getting claim : http://wso2.org/claims/identity/country of user"
| where not (LogEntry matches regex @"Tenant:\s*\[lilt\].*?iam-cloud-carbon\s*:\s*ERROR\s*\{org.wso2.carbon.identity.application.authentication.framework.config.model.graph.js.JsLogger\}")
| sort by TimeGenerated asc 
| project TimeGenerated, LogEntry
| parse LogEntry with * "Tenant: [" TenantName "]" *
| where isnotempty(TenantName)
| summarize LogCount = count() by TenantName
```

Traffic by Tenant

```
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category =~ "FrontdoorAccessLog"
| extend reqUri = tostring(requestUri_s)
| extend tenant_from_path = extract(@"/t/([^/]+)", 1, reqUri)
| extend custom_domain = extract(@"https?://([^/:]+)", 1, reqUri)
| extend tenant =
    case(
        isnotempty(tenant_from_path), tenant_from_path,
        isnotempty(custom_domain) and custom_domain !contains "asgardeo.io", custom_domain,
        ""
    )
| where isnotempty(tenant)
| summarize request_count = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 12h), tenant
| order by TimeGenerated asc
| render columnchart

Monitor Database growth (storage size), recommendations

Use the following script for Asgardeo
https://drive.google.com/file/d/1BgMnHdIfUd1v1X7sf3b_9oxhO88cSibc/view?usp=sharing

1. Download the script
2. Run `az login` to set subscription to asgardeo-prod
3. Run command 
      a. bash checkAzureSqlDbStorage.sh rg-asgardeo-main-prod-eastus2-001 sql-asgardeo-main-prod-eastus2-001 75
      b. bash checkAzureSqlDbStorage.sh rg-asgardeo-main-eupr-northeurope-001 sql-asgardeo-main-eupr-northeurope-001 75
4. Check API Latency

```
AzureDiagnostics
| project TimeGenerated, requestUri_s, timeTaken_d
| extend APICall = case(
                       requestUri_s contains "/oauth2/token",
                       "/oauth2/token",
                       requestUri_s contains "/oauth2/introspection",
                       "/oauth2/introspection",
                       requestUri_s contains "/commonauth",
                       "/commonauth",
                       requestUri_s contains "/authorize",
                       "/authorize",
                       requestUri_s contains "/scim2",
                       "/scim2",
                       requestUri_s contains "/api",
                       "/api",
                       "Other"
                   )
| summarize AvgLatency = avg(todouble(timeTaken_d)) by bin(TimeGenerated, 60m), APICall
| where APICall != "Other"
| render timechart
